displayTitle: Tales From The Occlusion Zone: The Fate Of Eriadu
synopsis: "Tales from the Occlusion Zone: The Fate of Eriadu" is a short story by Lydia Kang published as part of Tales from the Occlusion Zone in Star Wars Insider 229, on December 10, 2024.
title: Tales From The Occlusion Zone: The Fate Of Eriadu
